ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Jul-23-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: PCN-16-302057 Conservatorship of Gertha Curtis and PTR-22-305843 Gertha Curtis Trust.

Appearances: Rowena Navia for Lise McCarthy, Successor Trustee (via Zoom).
G. Franchesca Callejo, Court Appointed Attorney for Gertha R. Curtis, Conservatee (via Zoom).

From the outset of the hearing the Court addressed the immediate steps to redact the conservatee and her grandchild Nicole's driver's license numbers disclosed on an exhibit that was attached to the supplement filed on the July 2nd in the PCN case. The Court also wanted Ms. Navia to provide reassurance that there would be no conflict of interest from her or her firm's current representation of Paula Bibbs as former fiduciary and Lisa McCarthy as her successor.

Ms. Navia stated to the court that the issues were rectified, that all the issues were addressed in the supplement, that if there is any conflict in the future that she will withdraw as counsel, and that she is willing to reduce her fees to compensate for the $665.00 fees for her court appearances at the January and March 22 for hearings on Paula Bibbs delinquent accountings, and the $1055.00 for staff's fees.

The Court shall exonerate the bond upon receiving the receipt signed by Lisa McCarthy.

Both petitions are taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: PCN-18-302057 Conservatorship of Gertha R. Curtis and
PTR-22-305843 The Gertha R. Curtis Revocable Trust.

Appearances: Rowena Navia appeared by zoom for Paula Bibbs (former conservator/trustee).
Franchesca Callejo appeared by zoom for Gertha Curtis (conservatee).

Mrs. Navia stated that Mrs. McCarthy (current trustee/conservator) is being very helpful in getting records to assist her in filing the accounting. Mrs. Callejo stated that she has no concerns about Mrs. McCarthy and Mrs. Navia working together and that there is some movement in getting a conservator of the person as Mrs. Curtis' condition is worsening. Further discussion was held regarding the probate examiner's suggestion of having Ms. Navia file the accounting under Probate Code 2632(c) and which category this falls in. When asked about the disposition of the 2011 Toyota Corolla, Mrs. Navia stated that she has obtained records from Mrs. Bibbs showing transfer of ownership of the vehicle to Nicole. Status on filing of the second account, and status on filing proof of trustee's bond and first account are continued to January 6, 2025, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.

The court noted that an amended petition for the appointment of a successor trustee has been filed with a hearing date of July 3rd. Mrs. Navia stated that they will be filing a petition for the appointment of a successor conservator within a week, reported on the assets, and stated that she can file ex parte petitions for appointment of a temporary trustee and a temporary conservator. ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Trustee'S Bond
Off Calendar Jan-16-2024 Continued To Mar-12-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:

Rowena Navia, via Zoom, for Paula Bibbs, Trustee.

At the court's query, Ms. Navia offers advocacy for why the court should not order sanctions. After discussion, the court determines that it will not issue sanctions for failure to appear. The court and Ms. Navia discuss the status of the Conservatorship and related Trust matter. Ms. Navia requests a continuance to work with court-appointed counsel Franchesca Callejo on appointing a professional fiduciary to handle the pending accountings. At the court's query, Ms. Navia confirms that she intends to file a petition to approve her client's resignation.

After additional discussion, the Order to Appear/Order to Show Cause is taken off calendar. The remaining subject matters are continued to Mar-12-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Nam. Not Reported.
